assertions.notes: BFF returns cursor-paginated shape: { data: [...], has_more, limit }. The SPA reads data.data (not data.matches). A field rename that breaks this shape would produce an empty table. player_on_play is null for all rows in the layer5 corpus replay because the historical logs predate match.game_ended events (0 game_plays projected); player_on_play pipeline correctness is gated by TestProjectionIntegration_PlayerOnPlay (daemon-emit corpus fixtures, ticket #712).

corpus_promotion.note: #1317 AC1/AC4/AC3 hardening: +Brawl REAL loss (Jhixiaus/Kaito vs Kyle/Etali 2026-06-11) +2-1 multi-game synthetic +TraditionalStandard constructed synthetic (AC3, Prof gap); corpus grows 12→14→15 matches
